/usr/bin/c++ -fprofile-arcs -ftest-coverage -O0 -g -g -fprofile-arcs -ftest-coverage -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_queuemanager.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test_queuemanager.dir/test_queuemanager_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_queuemanager.dir/tests/test_queuemanager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_queuemanager.dir/src/TransferTask.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_queuemanager.dir/src/QueueManager.cpp.o -o test_queuemanager  /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6Test.so.6.8.2 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.8.2
